//: Phase 3 hard gates (double-wired per DEC-37). Scripts live in .claude/hooks/ (PowerShell, DEC-20). Invoked via explicit 'pwsh -NoProfile -File' so execution does not depend on the host's default shell or the 'shell' hook field (DEC-24). No 'if:' permission-rule filters anywhere (DEC-16): each script parses stdin and decides. The Bash and Edit|Write global layers are safe for the orchestrator because git-guard.ps1 and deny.ps1 pass through when stdin carries no agent_type.

PreToolUse.//: Global Bash leg. git-guard: no-commit-on-main for everyone + the full subagents-never-merge set when stdin has agent_type (DEC-37). tests-green: self-detects 'git commit' and blocks a red suite (no if: filter, so compound commands can't dodge it).

GitHub-plugin write gate (DEC-7/DEC-37). Blocks the plugin merge tool for everyone and plugin direct-writes targeting main. The orchestrator merges via 'gh pr merge' in Bash after approval, not this tool.

spec-freeze: design/ is frozen during implementation; lift with the .claude/spec-mode flag file (DEC-37). path-guard (deny.ps1) global backstop: enforces role write-scopes when stdin carries agent_type, passes the orchestrator through (DEC-37).

PostToolUse.//: Formatter (ruff format) on edited Python files. Never blocks (DEC-37).
